H6100.derivation: from H6096 (עָצֶה) and H1397 (גֶּבֶר); backbone-like of a man;
H6100.strongs_def: Etsjon-Geber, a place on the Red Sea

H6101.strongs_def: to lean idly, i.e. to be indolent or slack

H6105.derivation: a primitive root; also denominatively (from H6106 (עֶצֶם))
H6105.strongs_def: to bind fast, i.e. close (the eyes); intransitively, to be (causatively, make) powerful or numerous; to crunch the bones
H6105.kjv_def: break the bones, close, be great, be increased, be (wax) mighty(-ier), be more, shut, be(-come, make) strong(-er).
H6105.usage: increased(4x), mighty(4x), more(2x), closed(1x), great(1x), mightier(1x), shutteth(1x), stronger(1x)

H6106.strongs_def: a bone (as strong); by extension, the body; figuratively, the substance, i.e. (as pron.) selfsame
H6106.kjv_def: body, bone, [idiom] life, (self-) same, strength, [idiom] very.
H6106.usage: bone(104x), selfsame(11x), same(5x), body(2x), very(2x), life(1x), strength(1x)

H6112.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be sharp or strong;

H6113.strongs_def: to inclose; by analogy, to hold back; also to maintain, rule, assemble
H6113.kjv_def: [idiom] be able, close up, detain, fast, keep (self close, still), prevail, recover, refrain, [idiom] reign, restrain, retain, shut (up), slack, stay, stop, withhold (self).
H6113.usage: stayed(7x), retain(3x), detain(3x), able(2x), withhold(2x), keep(2x), prevail(1x), recover(1x), refrained(1x), reign(1x)

H6116.strongs_def: an assembly, especially on afestival or holiday

H6117.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to swell out or up; used only as denominative from H6119 (עָקֵב),
H6117.strongs_def: to seize by the heel; figuratively, to circumvent (as if tripping up the heels); also to restrain (as if holding by the heel)
H6117.kjv_def: take by the heel, stay, supplant, [idiom] utterly.

H6118.derivation: from H6117 (עָקַב) in the sense of H6119 (עָקֵב);
H6118.strongs_def: a heel, i.e. (figuratively) the last of anything (used adverbially, for ever); also result, i.e. compensation; and so (adverb with preposition or relatively) on account of
H6118.kjv_def: [idiom] because, by, end, for, if, reward.
H6118.usage: because(6x), reward(3x), end(2x), by(1x), for(1x), if(1x)

H6119.strongs_def: a heel (as protuberant); hence, a track; figuratively, the rear (of an army)
H6119.kjv_def: heel, (horse-) hoof, last, lier in wait (by mistake for H6120 (עָקֵב)), (foot-) step.

H6120.derivation: from H6117 (עָקַב) in its denominative sense;

H6121.derivation: from H6117 (עָקַב); in the original sense, a knoll (as swelling up); in the denominative sense

H6122.derivation: feminine of an unused form from H6117 (עָקַב) meaning a trick;

H6126.strongs_def: Akkub, the name of five Israelites

H6130.derivation: from an unused root meaning to twist; tortuous;

H6131.strongs_def: to pluck up (especially by the roots); specifically, to hamstring; figuratively, to exterminate
H6131.kjv_def: dig down, hough, pluck up, root up.

H6132.strongs_def: {to pluck up (especially by the roots); specifically, to hamstring; figuratively, to exterminate}

H6133.strongs_def: figuratively, a transplanted person, i.e. naturalized citizen

H6135.strongs_def: sterile (as if extirpated in the generative organs)

H6137.strongs_def: a scorpion; figuratively, a scourge or knotted whip

H6139.strongs_def: an Ekronite or inhabitant of Ekron

H6140.strongs_def: to knot or distort; figuratively, to pervert (act or declare perverse)

H6144.derivation: the same as H5892 (עִיר); a city;

H6147.strongs_def: Er, the name of two Israelites

H6148.strongs_def: to braid, i.e. intermix; technically, to traffic (as if by barter); also or give to be security (as a kind of exchange)
H6148.kjv_def: engage, (inter-) meddle (with), mingle (self), mortgage, occupy, give pledges, be(-come, put in) surety, undertake.
H6148.usage: surety(9x), meddle(2x), mingled(2x), pledges(2x), becometh(1x), engaged(1x), intermeddle(1x), mortgaged(1x), occupiers(1x), occupy(1x), undertake(1x)

H6149.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with H6148 (עָרַב) through the idea of close association);
H6149.kjv_def: be pleasant(-ing), take pleasure in, be sweet.

H6150.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with H6148 (עָרַב) through the idea of covering with a texture);

H6152.derivation: or עֲרַב; from H6150 (עָרַב) in the figurative sense of sterility;
H6152.strongs_def: Arab (i.e. Arabia), a country East of Palestine

H6153.usage: even(72x), evening(47x), night(4x), mingled(2x), people(2x), eventide(2x), Arabia(1x), days(1x)

H6154.derivation: or עֶרֶב; (1 Kings 10:15), (with the article [prefix), from H6148 (עָרַב);
H6154.strongs_def: the web (or transverse threads of cloth); also a mixture, (or mongrel race)

H6155.strongs_def: a willow (from the use of osiers as wattles)

H6159.derivation: or עוֹרֵב; the same as H6158 (עֹרֵב);
H6159.strongs_def: Oreb, the name of a Midianite and of the cliff near the Jordan
H6159.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6160.derivation: from H6150 (עָרַב) (in the sense of sterility);
H6160.strongs_def: a desert; especially (with the article prefix) the (generally) sterile valley of the Jordan and its continuation to the Red Sea
H6160.kjv_def: Arabah, champaign, desert, evening, heaven, plain, wilderness. See also H1026 (בֵּית הָעֲרָבָה).
H6160.usage: plain(42x), desert(9x), wilderness(5x), Arabah(2x), champaign(1x), evenings(1x), heavens(1x)

H6161.derivation: feminine passive participle of H6048 (עֲנַמֶּלֶךְ) in the sense of a bargain or exchange;
H6161.strongs_def: something given as security, i.e. (literally) a token (of safety) or (metaphorically) a bondsman

H6162.derivation: from H6148 (עָרַב) (in the sense of exchange);

H6163.strongs_def: an Arabian or inhabitant of Arab (i.e. Arabia)

H6164.strongs_def: an Arbathite or inhabitant of (Beth-) Arabah

H6166.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sequester itself; fugitive;
H6166.strongs_def: Arad, the name of a place near Palestine, also of a Canaanite and an Israelite
H6166.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H6168.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) bare; hence, to empty, pour out, demolish
H6168.kjv_def: leave destitute, discover, empty, make naked, pour (out), rase, spread self, uncover.
H6168.usage: uncover(3x), discover(3x), emptied(2x), rase(2x), poured(1x), spreading(1x)

H6170.derivation: or עֲרֻגָה; feminine passive participle of H6165 (עָרַג);
H6170.strongs_def: something piled up (as if (figuratively) raised by mental aspiration), i.e. a paterre

H6172.strongs_def: nudity, literally (especially the pudenda) or figuratively (disgrace, blemish)

H6174.derivation: or עָרֹם; from H6191 (עָרַם) (in its original sense);

H6176.strongs_def: a juniper (from its nudity of situation)

H6177.derivation: or עֲרֹעֵר; or עַרְעוֹר; the same as H6176 (עֲרוֹעֵר); nudity of situation;
H6177.strongs_def: Aroer, the name of three places in or near Palestine

H6178.strongs_def: feared, i.e. (concretely) a horrible place or chasm

H6180.strongs_def: a Erite (collectively) or descendants of Eri

H6182.derivation: from an unused root meaning to comminute;

H6183.strongs_def: the sky (as dropping at the horizon)

H6184.kjv_def: mighty, oppressor, in great power, strong, terrible, violent.
H6184.usage: terrible(8x), oppressor(3x), mighty(1x), power(1x), strong(1x), violent(1x)

H6186.strongs_def: to set in a row, i.e. arrange, put in order (in a very wide variety of applications)
H6186.kjv_def: put (set) (the battle, self) in array, compare, direct, equal, esteem, estimate, expert (in war), furnish, handle, join (battle), ordain, (lay, put, reckon up, set) (in) order, prepare, tax, value.
H6186.usage: array(26x), order(21x), prepare(5x), expert(3x), value(3x), compare(2x), direct(2x), equal(2x), estimate(2x), furnish(2x), ordained(2x)

H6187.kjv_def: equal, estimation, (things that are set in) order, price, proportion, [idiom] set at, suit, taxation, [idiom] valuest.
H6187.usage: estimation(24x), equal(1x), price(1x), proportion(1x), set(1x), suit(1x), taxation(1x), valuest(1x)

H6188.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to strip; but used as denominative from H6189 (עָרֵל);
H6188.strongs_def: to expose or remove the prepuce, whether literal (to go naked) or figurative (to refrain from using)
H6188.kjv_def: count uncircumcised, foreskin to be uncovered.

H6189.derivation: from H6188 (עָרֵל); properly, exposed, i.e. projecting loose (as to the prepuce); used only technically,
H6189.strongs_def: uncircumcised (i.e. still having the prepuce uncurtailed)

H6191.strongs_def: properly, to be (or make) bare; but used only in the derivative sense (through the idea perhaps of smoothness) to be cunning (usually in a bad sense)
H6191.kjv_def: [idiom] very, beware, take crafty (counsel), be prudent, deal subtilly.

H6195.strongs_def: trickery; or (in a good sense) discretion

H6196.strongs_def: the plane tree (from its smooth and shed bark)

H6198.strongs_def: an Eranite or descendant (collectively) of Eran
